data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Design that minimizes decision-making time for users by simplifying choices.

data.title: Fitts’ Law
data.description: Strategically places UI elements to reduce interaction time.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for essential controls.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Designs that group elements logically for better user perception.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Limits information presented at once to enhance retention.
data.technical_spec: Chunked information and modular content delivery.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users prefer website functions default to common design standards.
data.technical_spec: Familiar design patterns and symbol usage.
